  "themes": [
    {"id": "P1", "bar_start": 11, "bar_end": 26, "description": "Primary theme in C minor: tremolo C pedal in bass with chromatic upper-voice melody; forte chordal outburst bars 15–18; repeated bars 19–26"},
    {"id": "TR", "bar_start": 27, "bar_end": 50, "description": "Transition: lyrical E-flat major melody in right hand over left-hand accompanying figures, modulating toward E-flat"},
    {"id": "S1", "bar_start": 51, "bar_end": 88, "description": "Secondary theme in E-flat major: sustained B-flat pedal with melodic figuration in upper voice; cantabile character"},
    {"id": "CL", "bar_start": 89, "bar_end": 132, "description": "Closing theme: ascending scalar sequences, chromatic passing motion, culminating in strong PAC on E-flat major at bar 132"},
    {"id": "I", "bar_start": 1, "bar_end": 10, "description": "Grave introduction: dotted rhythm chords, dramatic gestures, stepwise descent; ends on dominant HC"},
    {"id": "Grav2", "bar_start": 135, "bar_end": 138, "description": "Grave interpolation within Allegro repeat section; fragments of introduction material in G minor context"},
    {"id": "DEV", "bar_start": 139, "bar_end": 196, "description": "Development: begins in E major, traverses e minor, a minor, g minor; extended sequential passages, chromatic descent, dominant pedal preparation for recapitulation"},
    {"id": "P1r", "bar_start": 197, "bar_end": 220, "description": "Recapitulation primary theme in C minor; mirrors bars 11–26"},
    {"id": "TRr", "bar_start": 221, "bar_end": 253, "description": "Recapitulation transition: shifted to F minor/C minor region with expanded sequential passage"},
    {"id": "S1r", "bar_start": 254, "bar_end": 286, "description": "Recapitulation secondary theme in C minor: parallel to exposition S theme but now in tonic minor"},
    {"id": "CLr", "bar_start": 287, "bar_end": 295, "description": "Recapitulation closing theme in C minor/major; similar figuration to exposition closing"},
    {"id": "CODA", "bar_start": 296, "bar_end": 312, "description": "Coda: brief Grave recall (bar 297–300), then final Allegro molto in C minor culminating in tonic unisons and final cadential block"}
  ]
}
